name: Inbox
description: Split-pane layout with a scrollable message list on the left and a preview panel on the right. Used for notifications, support tickets, email, and messaging.

slots.list-header: Search input + filter controls above the message list
slots.list: Scrollable list of message items with avatar, subject, preview, timestamp, read/unread state
slots.preview-header: Subject line + sender info + action buttons
